rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF KENNETH C ARCHIBALD
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Amended Order And Reconsideration Of Order For Final Distibution On Waiver Of Accounting, And Allowing Executor'S And Attorneys' Compensation For Ordinary Services

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF GERTIE VICTORIA FOSTER
rulings.Calendar Matter: Demurrer To First Amended Contest And Grounds Of Opposition To Probate Of Purported Will; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
rulings.Rulings: The demurrer is overruled. The Livingstons have sufficiently pled their cause of action for undue influence. (Krug v. Meehan (1952) 109 Cal.App.2d 274.) The prevailing party shall prepare a proposed order. Any party choosing to contest the tentative ruling must notify the Court and opposing counsel no later than 4:00 p.m. on 9/30/2015. If a party chooses to contest the tentative ruling, the hearing will take place at 2:15 p.m. on 10/1/2015.
